title: schizonepeta tenuifolia var. japonica
intro: Schizonepeta tenuifolia var. japonica, also known as Japanese pepperwort or Jing Jie, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is native to East Asia, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Schizonepeta tenuifolia var. japonica include relief from fever, colds, and flu, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. In traditional Chinese medicine, it is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
